heading: Nodaway River, Missouri
label: 37 Nodaway River, Missouri
text: Nodaway River, in the counties of Andrew, Holt, and Nodaway, in the State of Missouri, is declared to be not a navigable water of the United States within the meaning of the laws enacted by Congress for the preservation and protection of such waters.The right to alter, amend, or repeal this section is expressly reserved.
